title: Folder and subfolder creation through automation.....
excerpt: Why can’t we automate folder and sub-folder creation in monday? we have automations that ‘when status changes, create board from template, create board from template’… but these two templates just sit within a folder, th…

posts.author: mike01 (Mike)
posts.cookedHtml: Why can’t we automate folder and sub-folder creation in monday? we have automations that ‘when status changes, create board from template, create board from template’… but these two templates just sit within a folder, then we have to manually create the subfolder and then put these into that subfolder. It’s such a pain and seems such a ridiculously logical element which isn’t available.

posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @mike01 ,
Since you posted this question on the developers category, I’ll refer you to our docs regarding vreating folders and subfolers vis the monday API
If it’s not answer your issue, I would recommend you to post the thread on the Platform discussions category, or ask it on the Feature requests one.
Hope it helps,
Omer
